# playgroundDescription

**Instance Property**

A description of the support vector classifier shown in a playground.

## Declaration

```swift
var playgroundDescription: Any { get }
```

## Describing a support vector classifier

- **model**: The Core ML model.
- **description**: A text representation of the support vector classifier.
- **debugDescription**: A text representation of the support vector classifier that’s suitable for output during debugging.
